message.content: Can you make me a little desktop app that can stay open on my desktop and act as a to do list for me? Obviously this would have to have data persist across restarts of the device. I have pretty severe ADHD, so any ways to combat that (pomodoro timer, etc) would be useful features. Please employ any agents necessary along the way. Please ask me any and all questions to make this app more usable for me. Thanks! I also give you permission to make local agents for this task as well.

content.text:
Before I enter plan mode, I have several questions to make sure this app actually works for you:

**App style & behavior**
1. Do you want it to sit in the **system tray** (hidden until clicked), always be **on top of other windows**, or be a regular window you open/close?
2. Dark mode, light mode, or auto (match Windows)?

**To-do features**
3. Do you need **categories/projects** (e.g. "Work", "Home") or just a flat list?
4. **Due dates and reminders** — want it to notify you when something is due?
5. **Subtasks** (breaking big tasks into smaller steps)?
6. **Priority levels** (high/medium/low) or just ordering by drag?
7. **Recurring tasks** (e.g. "take meds" every day)?

**ADHD-specific**
8. For the **Pomodoro timer** — standard 25/5 minute split, or do you prefer custom intervals? Want it to auto-start the next session?
9. **Focus mode** — would you want a "I'm working on THIS right now" view that hides everything else?
10. **Notifications** — sound alerts, Windows system notifications, or just visual in-app?
11. Any interest in **gamification** (streaks, completion counts, small rewards)?
12. **Time estimates** on tasks — helpful for planning, or more friction than it's worth?
13. **Brain dump mode** — quick-add a task without thinking about categories/priority?

**Tech**
14. Are you comfortable with **Python** or **TypeScript/Electron** for this? Python (with a library like `tkinter` or `PyQt`) is simpler to run; Electron looks more polished but is heavier. There's also **Tauri** (TypeScript + Rust, very lightweight) if you want something modern.
15. Do you want to be able to access the data file yourself (plain JSON/SQLite), or does it not matter?

Answer as many or as few as you like — I'll fill in sensible defaults for anything you skip.

message.content: 1. System tray or an open/close window, please

content.text: [Request interrupted by user]

message.content: 1. System tray or an open/close window, please. 2. Dark mode, it is a preference of mine to always use dark UI. 3. Categories are great, but with ADHD if I can't see it, I'm very likely to forget it exists... this is a design challenge. 4. No, just having the ability to see when something is due would be great. Probably, I'd like to have a "DO BEFORE 5PM" thing where the time until 5pm is displayed because things close at 5 and if I forget those things I have to wait until the next day to do them. Having the current time be displayed in a large and interesting way would be sweet, too. 5. Subtasks are amazing. If I could have a place to estimate the time a task would take too, that would be sweet. 6. Ordering by drag is fine? color-coding could be cool too. 7. Yes PLEASE. 8. 4 sets of 25/5, with the standard 30 min break after the 4th set. I'd like to be able to start/stop it. 9. I'd like this to be toggleable, please. 10. Just visual in the app. 11. Uh sure? have the ability to do this, but don't actually implement anything when it comes to this, unless you make a gamification agent to research what it would look like to gamify it and have that agent do it. 12. Yes. 13. Also yes. 14. Whatever I could learn the most from is preferred. I am a growing dev and I need familiarity with the tools of the trade. 15. Accessing the data is optional, I dont care really. Thanks

content.content:
Entered plan mode. You should now focus on exploring the codebase and designing an implementation approach.

In plan mode, you should:
1. Thoroughly explore the codebase to understand existing patterns
2. Identify similar features and architectural approaches
3. Consider multiple approaches and their trade-offs
4. Use AskUserQuestion if you need to clarify the approach
5. Design a concrete implementation strategy
6. When ready, use ExitPlanMode to present your plan for approval

Remember: DO NOT write or edit any files yet. This is a read-only exploration and planning phase.

content.text: Since this is a brand new project with no existing codebase, I'll skip exploration and go straight to design. Let me launch a Plan agent and simultaneously spin up a background gamification research agent.

input.description: Design ADHD to-do desktop app architecture
input.prompt:
Design a detailed implementation plan for an ADHD-friendly desktop to-do app. This is a brand new project (no existing codebase).

## Tech Stack
- **Electron** + **electron-vite** (modern build tooling)
- **React 18** + **TypeScript** (renderer process)
- **Tailwind CSS** + **shadcn/ui** (UI components)
- **better-sqlite3** (local SQLite database for persistence)
- **@dnd-kit/core** (drag-and-drop reordering)
- **date-fns** (date utilities)

## User Profile
- Windows 11 user
- Developer learning modern web/desktop tools
- Has ADHD - design must fight "out of sight = out of mind"

## Required Features

### Core Task Management
- Tasks with: title, category, color, due date, "due before 5pm" flag, time estimate (minutes), subtasks, recurring pattern
- Drag-to-reorder tasks
- Color coding per task (left border or background tint)
- Recurring tasks: daily/weekly/monthly

### ADHD-Specific UI
1. **Large clock** in header - current time displayed prominently and stylishly
2. **"DO BEFORE 5PM" banner** - shows when tasks with the flag exist; displays countdown to 5PM; prominent, can't miss it
3. **Categories always visible** - sidebar or tabs; all categories always shown with task counts; "All Tasks" at top. Solve the "out of sight = out of mind" problem
4. **Brain dump** - quick-add floating button/shortcut, type task name + Enter, no friction
5. **Focus mode** (toggleable) - hides everything except current task + Pomodoro timer
6. **Pomodoro timer** - 4 sessions of 25/5 min, then 30 min long break; start/stop; progress indicator; visual only (no sounds)

### Other
- System tray (minimize to tray, open/close window)
- Dark mode (always dark, no toggle)
- Gamification placeholder (stub only, a separate agent will implement)

## SQLite Schema
Design tables for: categories, tasks, subtasks, pomodoro_sessions (for future gamification)

## Architecture
- `src/main/` - Electron main process: window management, system tray, IPC handlers, SQLite
- `src/renderer/` - React app: all UI
- `src/shared/` - TypeScript types shared between processes

## Deliverables
1. Complete file/folder structure
2. SQLite schema (CREATE TABLE statements)
3. IPC channel list (what main↔renderer communicate)
4. Component tree with responsibilities
5. Key implementation notes per feature
6. Setup/build commands
7. How to package for Windows

content.text:
# ADHD-Friendly Desktop To-Do App: Implementation Plan

This is a brand new project, so I'll design the full architecture from scratch. Let me establish the complete structure before diving into each deliverable.

---

## 1. File / Folder Structure

```
adhd-todo/
├── electron.vite.config.ts          # electron-vite build config
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── tsconfig.node.json               # for main process
├── tsconfig.web.json                # for renderer process
├── tailwind.config.ts
├── postcss.config.js
├── components.json                  # shadcn/ui config
├── .gitignore
│
├── resources/
│   └── icon.ico                     # system tray + app icon
│
├── src/
│   ├── main/                        # Electron main process (Node.js)
│   │   ├── index.ts                 # Entry: creates BrowserWindow, loads app
│   │   ├── tray.ts                  # SystemTray setup and menu
│   │   ├── window.ts                # Window creation/management helpers
│   │   ├── ipc/
│   │   │   ├── index.ts             # Registers all IPC handlers
│   │   │   ├── tasks.ts             # IPC handlers for task CRUD
│   │   │   ├── categories.ts        # IPC handlers for category CRUD
│   │   │   ├── subtasks.ts          # IPC handlers for subtask CRUD
│   │   │   └── pomodoro.ts          # IPC handlers for session logging
│   │   └── db/
│   │       ├── index.ts             # Opens DB, runs migrations
│   │       ├── migrations.ts        # CREATE TABLE statements
│   │       ├── tasks.ts             # DB queries: tasks
│   │       ├── categories.ts        # DB queries: categories
│   │       ├── subtasks.ts          # DB queries: subtasks
│   │       └── pomodoro.ts          # DB queries: pomodoro_sessions
│   │
│   ├── renderer/                    # React app (browser context)
│   │   ├── index.html
│   │   ├── main.tsx                 # React root, mounts <App />
│   │   ├── App.tsx                  # Layout shell, routing between views
│   │   ├── globals.css              # Tailwind directives + dark base styles
│   │   │
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   │   ├── layout/
│   │   │   │   ├── Header.tsx           # Clock + app title + global actions
│   │   │   │   ├── Sidebar.tsx          # Category list, always visible
│   │   │   │   └── AppShell.tsx         # Flex layout: sidebar + main content
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── clock/
│   │   │   │   └── LiveClock.tsx        # Large live clock, updates every second
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── banner/
│   │   │   │   └── Before5pmBanner.tsx  # Countdown banner, shown conditionally
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── tasks/
│   │   │   │   ├── TaskList.tsx         # DnD container, renders TaskCard list
│   │   │   │   ├── TaskCard.tsx         # Single task row with color, actions
│   │   │   │   ├── TaskForm.tsx         # Add/edit task modal form
│   │   │   │   ├── SubtaskList.tsx      # Inline subtask checklist
│   │   │   │   └── RecurringBadge.tsx   # Visual indicator for recurrence
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── categories/
│   │   │   │   ├── CategoryItem.tsx     # Single sidebar entry with count badge
│   │   │   │   └── CategoryForm.tsx     # Add/edit category modal
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── braindump/
│   │   │   │   └── BrainDumpInput.tsx   # Floating quick-add input + FAB button
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── focus/
│   │   │   │   ├── FocusMode.tsx        # Full-screen overlay: task + timer
│   │   │   │   └── PomodoroTimer.tsx    # Timer logic + visual ring/progress
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   └── gamification/
│   │   │       └── GamificationStub.tsx # Placeholder panel (no logic yet)
│   │   │
│   │   ├── hooks/
│   │   │   ├── useTasks.ts          # Fetch/mutate tasks via IPC
│   │   │   ├── useCategories.ts     # Fetch/mutate categories via IPC
│   │   │   ├── useSubtasks.ts       # Fetch/mutate subtasks via IPC
│   │   │   ├── useLiveClock.ts      # setInterval-based current time
│   │   │   ├── useBefore5pm.ts      # Derives countdown + banner visibility
│   │   │   ├── usePomodoro.ts       # Timer state machine (sessions, phases)
│   │   │   └── useDragOrder.ts      # Wraps @dnd-kit drag handlers
│   │   │
│   │   ├── store/
│   │   │   └── appStore.ts          # Zustand store: UI state (focus mode, active
│   │   │                            #   category, brain dump open, etc.)
│   │   │
│   │   └── lib/
│   │       ├── ipc.ts               # Typed wrappers around window.electron.ipcRenderer
│   │       └── utils.ts             # cn() helper, date formatters, color utils
│   │
│   └── shared/                      # Types visible to both processes
│       ├── types.ts                 # Core domain types (Task, Category, etc.)
│       └── ipc-channels.ts          # String constants for all IPC channel names
```

---

## 2. SQLite Schema

```sql
-- Run on first launch (or via migration version check)

PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_version (
  version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY
);

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Categories
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
  id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  name        TEXT    NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  color       TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT '#6366f1',  -- hex color
  sort_order  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at  TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

-- Seed a default category so the UI is never empty
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (name, color, sort_order)
VALUES ('Inbox', '#6366f1', 0);

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Tasks
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id                 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  category_id        INTEGER REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  title              TEXT    NOT NULL,
  color              TEXT,                          -- per-task override hex, nullable
  due_date           TEXT,                          -- ISO 8601 date string, nullable
  due_before_5pm     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,    -- boolean (0/1)
  time_estimate_mins INTEGER,                        -- nullable
  sort_order         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  is_complete        INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,    -- boolean (0/1)
  completed_at       TEXT,                          -- ISO 8601 datetime, nullable
  recurring_pattern  TEXT,                          -- 'none'|'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'
  recurring_base_id  INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  -- recurring_base_id links a generated recurrence back to its template task
  created_at         TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at         TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_category ON tasks(category_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_due_date  ON tasks(due_date);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_complete  ON tasks(is_complete);

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Subtasks
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subtasks (
  id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id     INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title       TEXT    NOT NULL,
  is_complete INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  sort_order  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at  TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_subtasks_task ON subtasks(task_id);

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Pomodoro Sessions (for future gamification)
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pomodoro_sessions (
  id           INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id      INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  phase        TEXT    NOT NULL,   -- 'work'|'short_break'|'long_break'
  duration_s   INTEGER NOT NULL,  -- planned duration in seconds
  started_at   TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  completed_at TEXT,              -- NULL if session was abandoned
  was_completed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  -- boolean
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pomodoro_task    ON pomodoro_sessions(task_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pomodoro_started ON pomodoro_sessions(started_at);
```

**Design notes:**
- `recurring_pattern` stores the rule on the template task; when a task is completed, the main process generates the next occurrence by cloning the row with an incremented `due_date` and sets `recurring_base_id`.
- `updated_at` on tasks should be maintained via application code on every UPDATE (SQLite triggers are possible but complex; simpler to handle in the DB layer).
- All datetimes are stored as ISO 8601 strings — SQLite has no native datetime type and this keeps interop with JavaScript's `Date` / `date-fns` trivial.

---

## 3. IPC Channel List

All channel names live in `src/shared/ipc-channels.ts` as string constants. The renderer calls `ipcRenderer.invoke(channel, payload)` and main responds via `ipcMain.handle(channel, handler)`.

### Tasks
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tasks:get-all` | R → M | `{ categoryId?: number, includeComplete?: boolean }` | `Task[]` |
| `tasks:get-by-id` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `Task \| null` |
| `tasks:create` | R → M | `Omit<Task, 'id' \| 'createdAt' \| 'updatedAt'>` | `Task` |
| `tasks:update` | R → M | `{ id: number } & Partial<Task>` | `Task` |
| `tasks:delete` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `void` |
| `tasks:reorder` | R → M | `{ orderedIds: number[] }` | `void` |
| `tasks:complete` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `Task` (may spawn next recurrence) |

### Categories
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `categories:get-all` | R → M | `{}` | `CategoryWithCount[]` |
| `categories:create` | R → M | `{ name: string, color: string }` | `Category` |
| `categories:update` | R → M | `{ id: number, name?: string, color?: string }` | `Category` |
| `categories:delete` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `void` |

### Subtasks
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `subtasks:get-by-task` | R → M | `{ taskId: number }` | `Subtask[]` |
| `subtasks:create` | R → M | `{ taskId: number, title: string }` | `Subtask` |
| `subtasks:update` | R → M | `{ id: number, title?: string, isComplete?: boolean }` | `Subtask` |
| `subtasks:delete` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `void` |
| `subtasks:reorder` | R → M | `{ taskId: number, orderedIds: number[] }` | `void` |

### Pomodoro
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `pomodoro:start-session` | R → M | `{ taskId?: number, phase: string, durationS: number }` | `{ sessionId: number }` |
| `pomodoro:complete-session` | R → M | `{ sessionId: number }` | `void` |

### Window / App
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `app:minimize-to-tray` | R → M | `{}` | `void` |
| `app:quit` | R → M | `{}` | `void` |

---

## 4. Component Tree with Responsibilities

```
App.tsx
  Loads initial data (categories + tasks) on mount via hooks
  Manages focusMode state from appStore
  Renders either FocusMode overlay OR AppShell

  AppShell.tsx
    Flex layout: fixed sidebar (240px) + fluid main column

    Header.tsx
      LiveClock.tsx          — Reads from useLiveClock(); displays HH:MM:SS
      Before5pmBanner.tsx    — Reads from useBefore5pm(); shows/hides + countdown
      [Focus mode toggle button]
      [Brain dump FAB]

    Sidebar.tsx
      CategoryItem.tsx × N   — Name + task count badge; click sets active category
        CategoryForm.tsx      — Modal; add/edit category name+color
      [+ Add Category button]

    MainContent area
      BrainDumpInput.tsx     — Floating input strip; visible when braindumpOpen=true
                               Pressing Enter calls tasks:create with minimal fields
      TaskList.tsx           — DndContext wrapper; renders sorted TaskCard list
        TaskCard.tsx × N     — Color left-border; title; due date chip; time estimate;
                               complete checkbox; subtask count; expand toggle; edit/delete
          SubtaskList.tsx    — Collapsible; SubtaskItem checkboxes; inline add
          RecurringBadge.tsx — Icon + tooltip showing recurrence pattern
        TaskForm.tsx          — Modal; full task editing (all fields)

  FocusMode.tsx (full-screen overlay, z-50)
    Current TaskCard (simplified, read-only title)
    PomodoroTimer.tsx        — Session counter (1-4 dots); phase label;
                               ring/arc progress indicator; start/stop button;
                               auto-advances through 4×(25+5) then 30min break

  GamificationStub.tsx       — Hidden panel / empty component with TODO comment
```

---

## 5. Key Implementation Notes per Feature

### Live Clock (`LiveClock.tsx` + `useLiveClock.ts`)
- `useLiveClock` uses `setInterval(fn, 1000)` to update a `Date` state variable. Return the cleanup function from `useEffect` to avoid memory leaks.
- Display with `date-fns` `format(now, 'hh:mm:ss aa')` (12-hour) or `HH:mm:ss` (24-hour). Choose one and document it.
- Style: very large font size (`text-6xl` or `text-7xl`), monospace font (`font-mono`) to prevent layout shift as digits change, slightly dimmed seconds digit.

### Before 5PM Banner (`useBefore5pm.ts` + `Before5pmBanner.tsx`)
- `useBefore5pm` derives whether any task has `due_before_5pm = true` AND `is_complete = false`. Recalculate whenever `tasks` array changes.
- Compute `target = setHours(today, 17, 0, 0, 0)`. Countdown = `differenceInSeconds(target, now)`. Format as `H:mm:ss remaining`.
- After 5pm, if tasks still exist, show "OVERDUE" state in red.
- Banner style: full-width, amber/orange background, large bold text, pulsing border animation via Tailwind `animate-pulse`.

### Categories Always Visible (`Sidebar.tsx` + `useCategories.ts`)
- Sidebar is `position: fixed` or `flex-shrink-0` — never collapses.
- First item is always "All Tasks" (hardcoded, no DB row needed).
- Each `CategoryItem` shows count via a JOIN query in `categories:get-all` that returns `CategoryWithCount` (adds a `taskCount: number` field).
- Active category is stored in Zustand `appStore`; filters the `tasks:get-all` call parameters.

### Brain Dump (`BrainDumpInput.tsx`)
- A floating action button (FAB) in the bottom-right corner, always visible (`position: fixed`, high z-index). Clicking it opens an input strip or modal.
- `Ctrl+Space` global keyboard shortcut via `useEffect` + `keydown` listener on `window` toggles the brain dump open state in `appStore`.
- On Enter: call `tasks:create` with just the title and the currently active category (or "Inbox" as default). Clear input. Keep open for rapid successive entries. Press `Escape` to close.

### Focus Mode (`FocusMode.tsx`)
- Toggled by a button in the Header. State in Zustand.
- When active, render a `position: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background` overlay — visually replaces everything.
- The user selects which task they are focusing on before entering (click a "Focus" button on a `TaskCard`). Store `focusTaskId` in `appStore`.
- `PomodoroTimer` renders inside `FocusMode` only.

### Pomodoro Timer (`PomodoroTimer.tsx` + `usePomodoro.ts`)
- Timer state lives entirely in the renderer (no IPC needed during a session). IPC is only called at session start (`pomodoro:start-session`) and end (`pomodoro:complete-session`) for logging.
- `usePomodoro` is a state machine with phases: `'idle' | 'work' | 'short_break' | 'long_break'`. Track `sessionIndex` (0–3).
- Use `setInterval(fn, 1000)` for countdown. Store `remainingSeconds` and decrement. Do not use `Date.now()` drift compensation for simplicity at this stage, but note it as a known limitation.
- Session sequence: work(25m) → short(5m) → work(25m) → short(5m) → work(25m) → short(5m) → work(25m) → long(30m) → repeat.
- Visual: SVG circle with `stroke-dashoffset` animation for the arc. Session dots: 4 small circles, filled as sessions complete.
- No audio. No OS notifications (can be added later). Visual only as specified.

### Drag-to-Reorder (`TaskList.tsx` + `useDragOrder.ts`)
- Wrap the task list in `DndContext` and `SortableContext` from `@dnd-kit`.
- Each `TaskCard` uses `useSortable(id)`. Apply `transform` and `transition` styles from the hook.
- `onDragEnd`: derive new order from `arrayMove`, call `tasks:reorder` with the new `orderedIds` array. The DB layer does a bulk UPDATE of `sort_order`.
- Optimistic update: update local state immediately, revert on IPC error.

### Recurring Tasks
- The template task has `recurring_pattern = 'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'`. Its own `due_date` is the first occurrence.
- When `tasks:complete` is called for a recurring task, the DB layer (in main): marks the current task as complete, then INSERTs a new task row cloned from the template with `due_date` advanced by the pattern interval, and `recurring_base_id` pointing to the original.
- The renderer does not need to know this happened — the hook refetches tasks after completion.
- Use `date-fns` `addDays`, `addWeeks`, `addMonths` for date arithmetic in the main process (these functions work in Node.js too).

### System Tray (`tray.ts`)
- Create `new Tray(iconPath)` in `tray.ts`. Call from `main/index.ts` after window creation.
- Context menu: "Open", "Quit".
- `mainWindow.on('close', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); mainWindow.hide(); })` — closing hides to tray rather than quitting.
- Double-clicking tray icon calls `mainWindow.show()`.
- `app.on('before-quit')` sets a flag that allows actual exit when Quit is chosen from tray.

### Dark Mode
- Tailwind config: `darkMode: 'class'`. Add `class="dark"` to `<html>` in `index.html` unconditionally (no toggle needed per spec).
- Define CSS variables for background, surface, border, and text in `globals.css` under `.dark {}`. Use shadcn/ui's default dark palette as the base.

### IPC Type Safety
- `src/shared/types.ts` defines all domain interfaces.
- `src/renderer/lib/ipc.ts` exports typed async functions (e.g., `getAllTasks(params): Promise<Task[]>`) that call `window.electron.ipcRenderer.invoke(...)` — this gives the renderer full type safety without importing Node modules.
- The `contextBridge` in Electron's `preload.ts` exposes `ipcRenderer.invoke` under `window.electron`.

---

## 6. Setup / Build Commands

```bash
# Initial project scaffolding (run once)
npm create @quick-start/electron adhd-todo -- --template react-ts
cd adhd-todo

# Install all runtime dependencies
npm install better-sqlite3 @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities date-fns zustand

# Install shadcn/ui peer deps + Tailwind
npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer
npx tailwindcss init -p

# Initialize shadcn/ui (follow prompts: TypeScript, CSS vars, dark mode class)
npx shadcn@latest init

# Add shadcn components used in this project
npx shadcn@latest add button dialog input label badge tooltip

# better-sqlite3 requires native bindings — rebuild for Electron's Node version
npm install -D electron-rebuild
npx electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3

# Development (hot reload for both main and renderer)
npm run dev

# Type-check without building
npm run typecheck

# Build for production (main + renderer bundled)
npm run build
```

Note: `better-sqlite3` is a native Node addon. The `electron-rebuild` step is mandatory. In `electron.vite.config.ts`, mark `better-sqlite3` as `external` in the main process Vite config so it is not bundled.

---

## 7. Packaging for Windows

```bash
# Install electron-builder
npm install -D electron-builder

# electron-builder config (add to package.json under "build" key)
{
  "appId": "com.yourname.adhd-todo",
  "productName": "ADHD Todo",
  "directories": { "output": "release" },
  "win": {
    "target": [{ "target": "nsis", "arch": ["x64"] }],
    "icon": "resources/icon.ico"
  },
  "nsis": {
    "oneClick": false,
    "allowToChangeInstallationDirectory": true,
    "perMachine": false
  },
  "files": [
    "dist/**",
    "dist-electron/**",
    "resources/**"
  ],
  "extraResources": [
    { "from": "resources/", "to": "resources/" }
  ]
}

# Build the installer
npm run build && npx electron-builder --win
# Output: release/ADHD Todo Setup 1.0.0.exe
```

**Critical packaging note for `better-sqlite3`:** Add `"asarUnpack": ["**/*.node"]` to the `build` config. Native `.node` files cannot be loaded from inside an `.asar` archive. Without this, the app will crash at launch on the user's machine.

**Icon requirement:** `resources/icon.ico` must be a multi-size `.ico` file (16, 32, 48, 64, 256px). Use a tool like `png2ico` or online converter. Electron's system tray on Windows specifically requires `.ico`.

---

## Additional Architecture Decisions

**State management split:** Zustand `appStore` holds only ephemeral UI state (active category, focus mode on/off, which task is focused, brain dump open). All persisted data (tasks, categories) lives in SQLite and is fetched fresh via IPC hooks on changes. Do not cache task data in Zustand — let the hooks be the source of truth to avoid sync bugs.

**Error boundaries:** Wrap the entire `<App />` in a React `ErrorBoundary` component. IPC failures should surface as toast notifications (shadcn/ui `Sonner` or `Toast`), not crashes.

**Preload script:** `src/preload/index.ts` must expose only what the renderer needs via `contextBridge`. Do not expose the entire `ipcRenderer` object — expose a whitelist of invoke calls to maintain Electron's security model.

**Window size:** Start with `1200 × 800`, `minWidth: 900`, `minHeight: 600`. The sidebar at 240px and a fluid task area needs at least 900px to be usable.

---

### Critical Files for Implementation

- `src/main/db/migrations.ts` - All CREATE TABLE statements; run this first as everything depends on the schema being correct
- `src/shared/types.ts` - Domain interfaces (Task, Category, Subtask, PomodoroSession) shared across the process boundary; must be defined before IPC handlers or React components can be typed
- `src/shared/ipc-channels.ts` - Channel name constants that both main IPC handlers and renderer IPC wrappers import; central coupling point
- `src/main/ipc/tasks.ts` - Most complex handler: handles CRUD, reorder, completion, and recurring task generation logic
- `src/renderer/hooks/usePomodoro.ts` - Self-contained timer state machine with no external dependencies; most algorithmically complex renderer code

toolUseResult.prompt:
Design a detailed implementation plan for an ADHD-friendly desktop to-do app. This is a brand new project (no existing codebase).

## Tech Stack
- **Electron** + **electron-vite** (modern build tooling)
- **React 18** + **TypeScript** (renderer process)
- **Tailwind CSS** + **shadcn/ui** (UI components)
- **better-sqlite3** (local SQLite database for persistence)
- **@dnd-kit/core** (drag-and-drop reordering)
- **date-fns** (date utilities)

## User Profile
- Windows 11 user
- Developer learning modern web/desktop tools
- Has ADHD - design must fight "out of sight = out of mind"

## Required Features

### Core Task Management
- Tasks with: title, category, color, due date, "due before 5pm" flag, time estimate (minutes), subtasks, recurring pattern
- Drag-to-reorder tasks
- Color coding per task (left border or background tint)
- Recurring tasks: daily/weekly/monthly

### ADHD-Specific UI
1. **Large clock** in header - current time displayed prominently and stylishly
2. **"DO BEFORE 5PM" banner** - shows when tasks with the flag exist; displays countdown to 5PM; prominent, can't miss it
3. **Categories always visible** - sidebar or tabs; all categories always shown with task counts; "All Tasks" at top. Solve the "out of sight = out of mind" problem
4. **Brain dump** - quick-add floating button/shortcut, type task name + Enter, no friction
5. **Focus mode** (toggleable) - hides everything except current task + Pomodoro timer
6. **Pomodoro timer** - 4 sessions of 25/5 min, then 30 min long break; start/stop; progress indicator; visual only (no sounds)

### Other
- System tray (minimize to tray, open/close window)
- Dark mode (always dark, no toggle)
- Gamification placeholder (stub only, a separate agent will implement)

## SQLite Schema
Design tables for: categories, tasks, subtasks, pomodoro_sessions (for future gamification)

## Architecture
- `src/main/` - Electron main process: window management, system tray, IPC handlers, SQLite
- `src/renderer/` - React app: all UI
- `src/shared/` - TypeScript types shared between processes

## Deliverables
1. Complete file/folder structure
2. SQLite schema (CREATE TABLE statements)
3. IPC channel list (what main↔renderer communicate)
4. Component tree with responsibilities
5. Key implementation notes per feature
6. Setup/build commands
7. How to package for Windows

content.text:
# ADHD-Friendly Desktop To-Do App: Implementation Plan

This is a brand new project, so I'll design the full architecture from scratch. Let me establish the complete structure before diving into each deliverable.

---

## 1. File / Folder Structure

```
adhd-todo/
├── electron.vite.config.ts          # electron-vite build config
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── tsconfig.node.json               # for main process
├── tsconfig.web.json                # for renderer process
├── tailwind.config.ts
├── postcss.config.js
├── components.json                  # shadcn/ui config
├── .gitignore
│
├── resources/
│   └── icon.ico                     # system tray + app icon
│
├── src/
│   ├── main/                        # Electron main process (Node.js)
│   │   ├── index.ts                 # Entry: creates BrowserWindow, loads app
│   │   ├── tray.ts                  # SystemTray setup and menu
│   │   ├── window.ts                # Window creation/management helpers
│   │   ├── ipc/
│   │   │   ├── index.ts             # Registers all IPC handlers
│   │   │   ├── tasks.ts             # IPC handlers for task CRUD
│   │   │   ├── categories.ts        # IPC handlers for category CRUD
│   │   │   ├── subtasks.ts          # IPC handlers for subtask CRUD
│   │   │   └── pomodoro.ts          # IPC handlers for session logging
│   │   └── db/
│   │       ├── index.ts             # Opens DB, runs migrations
│   │       ├── migrations.ts        # CREATE TABLE statements
│   │       ├── tasks.ts             # DB queries: tasks
│   │       ├── categories.ts        # DB queries: categories
│   │       ├── subtasks.ts          # DB queries: subtasks
│   │       └── pomodoro.ts          # DB queries: pomodoro_sessions
│   │
│   ├── renderer/                    # React app (browser context)
│   │   ├── index.html
│   │   ├── main.tsx                 # React root, mounts <App />
│   │   ├── App.tsx                  # Layout shell, routing between views
│   │   ├── globals.css              # Tailwind directives + dark base styles
│   │   │
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   │   ├── layout/
│   │   │   │   ├── Header.tsx           # Clock + app title + global actions
│   │   │   │   ├── Sidebar.tsx          # Category list, always visible
│   │   │   │   └── AppShell.tsx         # Flex layout: sidebar + main content
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── clock/
│   │   │   │   └── LiveClock.tsx        # Large live clock, updates every second
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── banner/
│   │   │   │   └── Before5pmBanner.tsx  # Countdown banner, shown conditionally
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── tasks/
│   │   │   │   ├── TaskList.tsx         # DnD container, renders TaskCard list
│   │   │   │   ├── TaskCard.tsx         # Single task row with color, actions
│   │   │   │   ├── TaskForm.tsx         # Add/edit task modal form
│   │   │   │   ├── SubtaskList.tsx      # Inline subtask checklist
│   │   │   │   └── RecurringBadge.tsx   # Visual indicator for recurrence
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── categories/
│   │   │   │   ├── CategoryItem.tsx     # Single sidebar entry with count badge
│   │   │   │   └── CategoryForm.tsx     # Add/edit category modal
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── braindump/
│   │   │   │   └── BrainDumpInput.tsx   # Floating quick-add input + FAB button
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   ├── focus/
│   │   │   │   ├── FocusMode.tsx        # Full-screen overlay: task + timer
│   │   │   │   └── PomodoroTimer.tsx    # Timer logic + visual ring/progress
│   │   │   │
│   │   │   └── gamification/
│   │   │       └── GamificationStub.tsx # Placeholder panel (no logic yet)
│   │   │
│   │   ├── hooks/
│   │   │   ├── useTasks.ts          # Fetch/mutate tasks via IPC
│   │   │   ├── useCategories.ts     # Fetch/mutate categories via IPC
│   │   │   ├── useSubtasks.ts       # Fetch/mutate subtasks via IPC
│   │   │   ├── useLiveClock.ts      # setInterval-based current time
│   │   │   ├── useBefore5pm.ts      # Derives countdown + banner visibility
│   │   │   ├── usePomodoro.ts       # Timer state machine (sessions, phases)
│   │   │   └── useDragOrder.ts      # Wraps @dnd-kit drag handlers
│   │   │
│   │   ├── store/
│   │   │   └── appStore.ts          # Zustand store: UI state (focus mode, active
│   │   │                            #   category, brain dump open, etc.)
│   │   │
│   │   └── lib/
│   │       ├── ipc.ts               # Typed wrappers around window.electron.ipcRenderer
│   │       └── utils.ts             # cn() helper, date formatters, color utils
│   │
│   └── shared/                      # Types visible to both processes
│       ├── types.ts                 # Core domain types (Task, Category, etc.)
│       └── ipc-channels.ts          # String constants for all IPC channel names
```

---

## 2. SQLite Schema

```sql
-- Run on first launch (or via migration version check)

PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_version (
  version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY
);

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Categories
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
  id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  name        TEXT    NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  color       TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT '#6366f1',  -- hex color
  sort_order  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at  TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

-- Seed a default category so the UI is never empty
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (name, color, sort_order)
VALUES ('Inbox', '#6366f1', 0);

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Tasks
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id                 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  category_id        INTEGER REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  title              TEXT    NOT NULL,
  color              TEXT,                          -- per-task override hex, nullable
  due_date           TEXT,                          -- ISO 8601 date string, nullable
  due_before_5pm     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,    -- boolean (0/1)
  time_estimate_mins INTEGER,                        -- nullable
  sort_order         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  is_complete        INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,    -- boolean (0/1)
  completed_at       TEXT,                          -- ISO 8601 datetime, nullable
  recurring_pattern  TEXT,                          -- 'none'|'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'
  recurring_base_id  INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  -- recurring_base_id links a generated recurrence back to its template task
  created_at         TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at         TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_category ON tasks(category_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_due_date  ON tasks(due_date);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_complete  ON tasks(is_complete);

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Subtasks
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subtasks (
  id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id     INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title       TEXT    NOT NULL,
  is_complete INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  sort_order  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at  TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_subtasks_task ON subtasks(task_id);

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
-- Pomodoro Sessions (for future gamification)
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pomodoro_sessions (
  id           INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id      INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  phase        TEXT    NOT NULL,   -- 'work'|'short_break'|'long_break'
  duration_s   INTEGER NOT NULL,  -- planned duration in seconds
  started_at   TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  completed_at TEXT,              -- NULL if session was abandoned
  was_completed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  -- boolean
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pomodoro_task    ON pomodoro_sessions(task_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pomodoro_started ON pomodoro_sessions(started_at);
```

**Design notes:**
- `recurring_pattern` stores the rule on the template task; when a task is completed, the main process generates the next occurrence by cloning the row with an incremented `due_date` and sets `recurring_base_id`.
- `updated_at` on tasks should be maintained via application code on every UPDATE (SQLite triggers are possible but complex; simpler to handle in the DB layer).
- All datetimes are stored as ISO 8601 strings — SQLite has no native datetime type and this keeps interop with JavaScript's `Date` / `date-fns` trivial.

---

## 3. IPC Channel List

All channel names live in `src/shared/ipc-channels.ts` as string constants. The renderer calls `ipcRenderer.invoke(channel, payload)` and main responds via `ipcMain.handle(channel, handler)`.

### Tasks
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tasks:get-all` | R → M | `{ categoryId?: number, includeComplete?: boolean }` | `Task[]` |
| `tasks:get-by-id` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `Task \| null` |
| `tasks:create` | R → M | `Omit<Task, 'id' \| 'createdAt' \| 'updatedAt'>` | `Task` |
| `tasks:update` | R → M | `{ id: number } & Partial<Task>` | `Task` |
| `tasks:delete` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `void` |
| `tasks:reorder` | R → M | `{ orderedIds: number[] }` | `void` |
| `tasks:complete` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `Task` (may spawn next recurrence) |

### Categories
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `categories:get-all` | R → M | `{}` | `CategoryWithCount[]` |
| `categories:create` | R → M | `{ name: string, color: string }` | `Category` |
| `categories:update` | R → M | `{ id: number, name?: string, color?: string }` | `Category` |
| `categories:delete` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `void` |

### Subtasks
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `subtasks:get-by-task` | R → M | `{ taskId: number }` | `Subtask[]` |
| `subtasks:create` | R → M | `{ taskId: number, title: string }` | `Subtask` |
| `subtasks:update` | R → M | `{ id: number, title?: string, isComplete?: boolean }` | `Subtask` |
| `subtasks:delete` | R → M | `{ id: number }` | `void` |
| `subtasks:reorder` | R → M | `{ taskId: number, orderedIds: number[] }` | `void` |

### Pomodoro
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `pomodoro:start-session` | R → M | `{ taskId?: number, phase: string, durationS: number }` | `{ sessionId: number }` |
| `pomodoro:complete-session` | R → M | `{ sessionId: number }` | `void` |

### Window / App
| Channel | Direction | Payload | Returns |
|---|---|---|---|
| `app:minimize-to-tray` | R → M | `{}` | `void` |
| `app:quit` | R → M | `{}` | `void` |

---

## 4. Component Tree with Responsibilities

```
App.tsx
  Loads initial data (categories + tasks) on mount via hooks
  Manages focusMode state from appStore
  Renders either FocusMode overlay OR AppShell

  AppShell.tsx
    Flex layout: fixed sidebar (240px) + fluid main column

    Header.tsx
      LiveClock.tsx          — Reads from useLiveClock(); displays HH:MM:SS
      Before5pmBanner.tsx    — Reads from useBefore5pm(); shows/hides + countdown
      [Focus mode toggle button]
      [Brain dump FAB]

    Sidebar.tsx
      CategoryItem.tsx × N   — Name + task count badge; click sets active category
        CategoryForm.tsx      — Modal; add/edit category name+color
      [+ Add Category button]

    MainContent area
      BrainDumpInput.tsx     — Floating input strip; visible when braindumpOpen=true
                               Pressing Enter calls tasks:create with minimal fields
      TaskList.tsx           — DndContext wrapper; renders sorted TaskCard list
        TaskCard.tsx × N     — Color left-border; title; due date chip; time estimate;
                               complete checkbox; subtask count; expand toggle; edit/delete
          SubtaskList.tsx    — Collapsible; SubtaskItem checkboxes; inline add
          RecurringBadge.tsx — Icon + tooltip showing recurrence pattern
        TaskForm.tsx          — Modal; full task editing (all fields)

  FocusMode.tsx (full-screen overlay, z-50)
    Current TaskCard (simplified, read-only title)
    PomodoroTimer.tsx        — Session counter (1-4 dots); phase label;
                               ring/arc progress indicator; start/stop button;
                               auto-advances through 4×(25+5) then 30min break

  GamificationStub.tsx       — Hidden panel / empty component with TODO comment
```

---

## 5. Key Implementation Notes per Feature

### Live Clock (`LiveClock.tsx` + `useLiveClock.ts`)
- `useLiveClock` uses `setInterval(fn, 1000)` to update a `Date` state variable. Return the cleanup function from `useEffect` to avoid memory leaks.
- Display with `date-fns` `format(now, 'hh:mm:ss aa')` (12-hour) or `HH:mm:ss` (24-hour). Choose one and document it.
- Style: very large font size (`text-6xl` or `text-7xl`), monospace font (`font-mono`) to prevent layout shift as digits change, slightly dimmed seconds digit.

### Before 5PM Banner (`useBefore5pm.ts` + `Before5pmBanner.tsx`)
- `useBefore5pm` derives whether any task has `due_before_5pm = true` AND `is_complete = false`. Recalculate whenever `tasks` array changes.
- Compute `target = setHours(today, 17, 0, 0, 0)`. Countdown = `differenceInSeconds(target, now)`. Format as `H:mm:ss remaining`.
- After 5pm, if tasks still exist, show "OVERDUE" state in red.
- Banner style: full-width, amber/orange background, large bold text, pulsing border animation via Tailwind `animate-pulse`.

### Categories Always Visible (`Sidebar.tsx` + `useCategories.ts`)
- Sidebar is `position: fixed` or `flex-shrink-0` — never collapses.
- First item is always "All Tasks" (hardcoded, no DB row needed).
- Each `CategoryItem` shows count via a JOIN query in `categories:get-all` that returns `CategoryWithCount` (adds a `taskCount: number` field).
- Active category is stored in Zustand `appStore`; filters the `tasks:get-all` call parameters.

### Brain Dump (`BrainDumpInput.tsx`)
- A floating action button (FAB) in the bottom-right corner, always visible (`position: fixed`, high z-index). Clicking it opens an input strip or modal.
- `Ctrl+Space` global keyboard shortcut via `useEffect` + `keydown` listener on `window` toggles the brain dump open state in `appStore`.
- On Enter: call `tasks:create` with just the title and the currently active category (or "Inbox" as default). Clear input. Keep open for rapid successive entries. Press `Escape` to close.

### Focus Mode (`FocusMode.tsx`)
- Toggled by a button in the Header. State in Zustand.
- When active, render a `position: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background` overlay — visually replaces everything.
- The user selects which task they are focusing on before entering (click a "Focus" button on a `TaskCard`). Store `focusTaskId` in `appStore`.
- `PomodoroTimer` renders inside `FocusMode` only.

### Pomodoro Timer (`PomodoroTimer.tsx` + `usePomodoro.ts`)
- Timer state lives entirely in the renderer (no IPC needed during a session). IPC is only called at session start (`pomodoro:start-session`) and end (`pomodoro:complete-session`) for logging.
- `usePomodoro` is a state machine with phases: `'idle' | 'work' | 'short_break' | 'long_break'`. Track `sessionIndex` (0–3).
- Use `setInterval(fn, 1000)` for countdown. Store `remainingSeconds` and decrement. Do not use `Date.now()` drift compensation for simplicity at this stage, but note it as a known limitation.
- Session sequence: work(25m) → short(5m) → work(25m) → short(5m) → work(25m) → short(5m) → work(25m) → long(30m) → repeat.
- Visual: SVG circle with `stroke-dashoffset` animation for the arc. Session dots: 4 small circles, filled as sessions complete.
- No audio. No OS notifications (can be added later). Visual only as specified.

### Drag-to-Reorder (`TaskList.tsx` + `useDragOrder.ts`)
- Wrap the task list in `DndContext` and `SortableContext` from `@dnd-kit`.
- Each `TaskCard` uses `useSortable(id)`. Apply `transform` and `transition` styles from the hook.
- `onDragEnd`: derive new order from `arrayMove`, call `tasks:reorder` with the new `orderedIds` array. The DB layer does a bulk UPDATE of `sort_order`.
- Optimistic update: update local state immediately, revert on IPC error.

### Recurring Tasks
- The template task has `recurring_pattern = 'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'`. Its own `due_date` is the first occurrence.
- When `tasks:complete` is called for a recurring task, the DB layer (in main): marks the current task as complete, then INSERTs a new task row cloned from the template with `due_date` advanced by the pattern interval, and `recurring_base_id` pointing to the original.
- The renderer does not need to know this happened — the hook refetches tasks after completion.
- Use `date-fns` `addDays`, `addWeeks`, `addMonths` for date arithmetic in the main process (these functions work in Node.js too).

### System Tray (`tray.ts`)
- Create `new Tray(iconPath)` in `tray.ts`. Call from `main/index.ts` after window creation.
- Context menu: "Open", "Quit".
- `mainWindow.on('close', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); mainWindow.hide(); })` — closing hides to tray rather than quitting.
- Double-clicking tray icon calls `mainWindow.show()`.
- `app.on('before-quit')` sets a flag that allows actual exit when Quit is chosen from tray.

### Dark Mode
- Tailwind config: `darkMode: 'class'`. Add `class="dark"` to `<html>` in `index.html` unconditionally (no toggle needed per spec).
- Define CSS variables for background, surface, border, and text in `globals.css` under `.dark {}`. Use shadcn/ui's default dark palette as the base.

### IPC Type Safety
- `src/shared/types.ts` defines all domain interfaces.
- `src/renderer/lib/ipc.ts` exports typed async functions (e.g., `getAllTasks(params): Promise<Task[]>`) that call `window.electron.ipcRenderer.invoke(...)` — this gives the renderer full type safety without importing Node modules.
- The `contextBridge` in Electron's `preload.ts` exposes `ipcRenderer.invoke` under `window.electron`.

---

## 6. Setup / Build Commands

```bash
# Initial project scaffolding (run once)
npm create @quick-start/electron adhd-todo -- --template react-ts
cd adhd-todo

# Install all runtime dependencies
npm install better-sqlite3 @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities date-fns zustand

# Install shadcn/ui peer deps + Tailwind
npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer
npx tailwindcss init -p

# Initialize shadcn/ui (follow prompts: TypeScript, CSS vars, dark mode class)
npx shadcn@latest init

# Add shadcn components used in this project
npx shadcn@latest add button dialog input label badge tooltip

# better-sqlite3 requires native bindings — rebuild for Electron's Node version
npm install -D electron-rebuild
npx electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3

# Development (hot reload for both main and renderer)
npm run dev

# Type-check without building
npm run typecheck

# Build for production (main + renderer bundled)
npm run build
```

Note: `better-sqlite3` is a native Node addon. The `electron-rebuild` step is mandatory. In `electron.vite.config.ts`, mark `better-sqlite3` as `external` in the main process Vite config so it is not bundled.

---

## 7. Packaging for Windows

```bash
# Install electron-builder
npm install -D electron-builder

# electron-builder config (add to package.json under "build" key)
{
  "appId": "com.yourname.adhd-todo",
  "productName": "ADHD Todo",
  "directories": { "output": "release" },
  "win": {
    "target": [{ "target": "nsis", "arch": ["x64"] }],
    "icon": "resources/icon.ico"
  },
  "nsis": {
    "oneClick": false,
    "allowToChangeInstallationDirectory": true,
    "perMachine": false
  },
  "files": [
    "dist/**",
    "dist-electron/**",
    "resources/**"
  ],
  "extraResources": [
    { "from": "resources/", "to": "resources/" }
  ]
}

# Build the installer
npm run build && npx electron-builder --win
# Output: release/ADHD Todo Setup 1.0.0.exe
```

**Critical packaging note for `better-sqlite3`:** Add `"asarUnpack": ["**/*.node"]` to the `build` config. Native `.node` files cannot be loaded from inside an `.asar` archive. Without this, the app will crash at launch on the user's machine.

**Icon requirement:** `resources/icon.ico` must be a multi-size `.ico` file (16, 32, 48, 64, 256px). Use a tool like `png2ico` or online converter. Electron's system tray on Windows specifically requires `.ico`.

---

## Additional Architecture Decisions

**State management split:** Zustand `appStore` holds only ephemeral UI state (active category, focus mode on/off, which task is focused, brain dump open). All persisted data (tasks, categories) lives in SQLite and is fetched fresh via IPC hooks on changes. Do not cache task data in Zustand — let the hooks be the source of truth to avoid sync bugs.

**Error boundaries:** Wrap the entire `<App />` in a React `ErrorBoundary` component. IPC failures should surface as toast notifications (shadcn/ui `Sonner` or `Toast`), not crashes.

**Preload script:** `src/preload/index.ts` must expose only what the renderer needs via `contextBridge`. Do not expose the entire `ipcRenderer` object — expose a whitelist of invoke calls to maintain Electron's security model.

**Window size:** Start with `1200 × 800`, `minWidth: 900`, `minHeight: 600`. The sidebar at 240px and a fluid task area needs at least 900px to be usable.

---

### Critical Files for Implementation

- `src/main/db/migrations.ts` - All CREATE TABLE statements; run this first as everything depends on the schema being correct
- `src/shared/types.ts` - Domain interfaces (Task, Category, Subtask, PomodoroSession) shared across the process boundary; must be defined before IPC handlers or React components can be typed
- `src/shared/ipc-channels.ts` - Channel name constants that both main IPC handlers and renderer IPC wrappers import; central coupling point
- `src/main/ipc/tasks.ts` - Most complex handler: handles CRUD, reorder, completion, and recurring task generation logic
- `src/renderer/hooks/usePomodoro.ts` - Self-contained timer state machine with no external dependencies; most algorithmically complex renderer code
Excellent. Now let me launch the gamification research agent in the background, then write the plan file.

input.content:
# ADHD To-Do Desktop App — Implementation Plan

## Context
Build a brand-new Electron desktop to-do app for a user with ADHD. The app must be dark-mode only, persist data via SQLite, live in the system tray, and include ADHD-friendly features: large live clock, "DO BEFORE 5PM" countdown, focus mode, Pomodoro timer (4×25/5 + 30min break), brain dump quick-add, subtasks with time estimates, drag-to-reorder, color coding, and recurring tasks. A gamification research agent is running in the background; its findings will be implemented in a follow-up session.

## Tech Stack
- **Electron** + **electron-vite** (scaffolded via `npm create @quick-start/electron`)
- **React 18** + **TypeScript** (renderer)
- **Tailwind CSS** + **shadcn/ui** (dark UI components)
- **better-sqlite3** (SQLite; native addon, requires `electron-rebuild`)
- **@dnd-kit** (drag-and-drop)
- **date-fns** (date math in both processes)
- **Zustand** (ephemeral UI state only — not persisted task data)

## File Structure
```
adhd-todo/
├── electron.vite.config.ts
├── package.json / tsconfig*.json / tailwind.config.ts
├── resources/icon.ico
└── src/
    ├── main/
    │   ├── index.ts          # BrowserWindow, tray, app lifecycle
    │   ├── tray.ts           # SystemTray + context menu
    │   ├── window.ts         # Window helpers
    │   ├── ipc/
    │   │   ├── index.ts      # Registers all handlers
    │   │   ├── tasks.ts      # CRUD + reorder + complete (handles recurrence)
    │   │   ├── categories.ts
    │   │   ├── subtasks.ts
    │   │   └── pomodoro.ts   # Session start/complete logging
    │   └── db/
    │       ├── index.ts      # Open DB + run migrations
    │       ├── migrations.ts # All CREATE TABLE statements
    │       ├── tasks.ts / categories.ts / subtasks.ts / pomodoro.ts
    ├── preload/
    │   └── index.ts          # contextBridge whitelist of ipcRenderer.invoke
    ├── renderer/
    │   ├── main.tsx / App.tsx / globals.css
    │   ├── components/
    │   │   ├── layout/       AppShell, Header, Sidebar
    │   │   ├── clock/        LiveClock
    │   │   ├── banner/       Before5pmBanner
    │   │   ├── tasks/        TaskList, TaskCard, TaskForm, SubtaskList, RecurringBadge
    │   │   ├── categories/   CategoryItem, CategoryForm
    │   │   ├── braindump/    BrainDumpInput (FAB + Ctrl+Space shortcut)
    │   │   ├── focus/        FocusMode, PomodoroTimer
    │   │   └── gamification/ GamificationStub (empty placeholder)
    │   ├── hooks/            useTasks, useCategories, useSubtasks, useLiveClock,
    │   │                     useBefore5pm, usePomodoro, useDragOrder
    │   ├── store/            appStore.ts (Zustand: activeCategory, focusMode,
    │   │                     focusTaskId, brainDumpOpen)
    │   └── lib/              ipc.ts (typed wrappers), utils.ts
    └── shared/
        ├── types.ts          # Task, Category, Subtask, PomodoroSession interfaces
        └── ipc-channels.ts   # Channel name constants
```

## SQLite Schema (src/main/db/migrations.ts)
```sql
PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  color TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '#6366f1',
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (name, color) VALUES ('Inbox', '#6366f1');

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  category_id INTEGER REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  color TEXT,
  due_date TEXT,
  due_before_5pm INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  time_estimate_mins INTEGER,
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  is_complete INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  completed_at TEXT,
  recurring_pattern TEXT,       -- 'none'|'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'
  recurring_base_id INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subtasks (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  is_complete INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pomodoro_sessions (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  phase TEXT NOT NULL,          -- 'work'|'short_break'|'long_break'
  duration_s INTEGER NOT NULL,
  started_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  completed_at TEXT,
  was_completed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
);
```

## IPC Channels (src/shared/ipc-channels.ts)
- `tasks:get-all`, `tasks:get-by-id`, `tasks:create`, `tasks:update`, `tasks:delete`, `tasks:reorder`, `tasks:complete`
- `categories:get-all` (returns `CategoryWithCount`), `categories:create`, `categories:update`, `categories:delete`
- `subtasks:get-by-task`, `subtasks:create`, `subtasks:update`, `subtasks:delete`, `subtasks:reorder`
- `pomodoro:start-session`, `pomodoro:complete-session`
- `app:minimize-to-tray`, `app:quit`

## Key Implementation Notes

### Critical build notes
- `better-sqlite3` is a native addon — run `npx electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3` after install
- Mark `better-sqlite3` as `external` in the main-process Vite config
- Packaging: add `"asarUnpack": ["**/*.node"]` to electron-builder config

### System Tray
- `mainWindow.on('close', e => { e.preventDefault(); mainWindow.hide() })` — hides instead of closing
- `app.on('before-quit')` sets a flag to allow real exit from tray menu "Quit"

### Dark Mode
- Tailwind `darkMode: 'class'`; add `class="dark"` to `<html>` unconditionally in `index.html`

### Clock (`useLiveClock` + `LiveClock.tsx`)
- `setInterval` every 1s updating a `Date` state; cleanup in `useEffect` return
- Display: `text-7xl font-mono` to prevent layout shift; dimmed seconds

### Before 5PM Banner (`useBefore5pm` + `Before5pmBanner.tsx`)
- Filter tasks: `due_before_5pm=true AND is_complete=false`
- Countdown = `differenceInSeconds(setHours(today,17,0,0,0), now)`; show "OVERDUE" in red after 5pm
- Style: full-width amber banner with `animate-pulse` border

### Categories Sidebar — "always visible" ADHD fix
- Fixed sidebar, never collapses, always renders all categories
- `categories:get-all` returns task count per category via JOIN
- "All Tasks" is a hardcoded first entry (no DB row)
- Active category stored in Zustand; filters `tasks:get-all` payload

### Brain Dump (`BrainDumpInput.tsx`)
- FAB fixed bottom-right; `Ctrl+Space` global keydown listener toggles it
- On Enter: `tasks:create` with title + active category (or Inbox). Stay open for rapid entry. Escape closes.

### Focus Mode (`FocusMode.tsx`)
- Full-screen `position: fixed inset-0 z-50` overlay; toggled via Zustand `focusMode`
- TaskCard "Focus" button sets `focusTaskId` in store before entering
- `PomodoroTimer` only renders inside FocusMode

### Pomodoro (`usePomodoro.ts`)
- State machine: `idle → work(25m) → short_break(5m)` × 4, then `long_break(30m)`, repeat
- `setInterval` countdown; `sessionIndex` 0–3 tracks position in cycle
- SVG circle arc (`stroke-dashoffset`) for progress; 4 dot indicators
- IPC only at session start/end (for logging); timer logic stays in renderer

### Drag-to-Reorder (`@dnd-kit`)
- `DndContext` + `SortableContext` wrapping `TaskList`; each `TaskCard` uses `useSortable`
- `onDragEnd`: `arrayMove` → optimistic local update → `tasks:reorder` IPC
- Revert on IPC failure

### Recurring Tasks
- On `tasks:complete` for a recurring task: mark complete, INSERT new row with `due_date` advanced by `addDays`/`addWeeks`/`addMonths` (date-fns in main process)

### Gamification
- `GamificationStub.tsx` — empty component with a TODO comment
- `pomodoro_sessions` table already logs data for future use
- Research agent running in background; findings saved to memory for next session

## Build & Package Commands
```bash
npm create @quick-start/electron adhd-todo -- --template react-ts
cd adhd-todo
npm install better-sqlite3 @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities date-fns zustand
npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer electron-rebuild electron-builder
npx tailwindcss init -p
npx shadcn@latest init
npx shadcn@latest add button dialog input label badge tooltip
npx electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3
npm run dev          # hot reload
npm run build && npx electron-builder --win   # produces .exe in release/
```

## Verification
1. `npm run dev` — app launches, tray icon appears, window opens/hides correctly
2. Add a task → appears in list; reload app → task persists (SQLite)
3. Mark a recurring daily task complete → new task appears with tomorrow's date
4. Brain dump: `Ctrl+Space` → type → Enter → task appears instantly
5. Pomodoro: start → 25min countdown → auto-transitions to break → 4th break is 30min
6. Before5pmBanner: add a task with `due_before_5pm=true` → banner appears with countdown
7. Drag a task → order persists after reload

## Gamification (follow-up)
- Background agent `ac5292acbafe192e8` is researching ADHD gamification patterns
- Findings will be saved to memory; implement in a separate session after core app is complete

```sql
  task_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  is_complete INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pomodoro_sessions (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  phase TEXT NOT NULL,          -- 'work'|'short_break'|'long_break'
  duration_s INTEGER NOT NULL,
  started_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  completed_at TEXT,
  was_completed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
);
```

## IPC Channels (src/shared/ipc-channels.ts)
- `tasks:get-all`, `tasks:get-by-id`, `tasks:create`, `tasks:update`, `tasks:delete`, `tasks:reorder`, `tasks:complete`
- `categories:get-all` (returns `CategoryWithCount`), `categories:create`, `categories:update`, `categories:delete`
- `subtasks:get-by-task`, `subtasks:create`, `subtasks:update`, `subtasks:delete`, `subtasks:reorder`
- `pomodoro:start-session`, `pomodoro:complete-session`
- `app:minimize-to-tray`, `app:quit`

## Key Implementation Notes

### Critical build notes
- `better-sqlite3` is a native addon — run `npx electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3` after install
- Mark `better-sqlite3` as `external` in the main-process Vite config
- Packaging: add `"asarUnpack": ["**/*.node"]` to electron-builder config

### System Tray
- `mainWindow.on('close', e => { e.preventDefault(); mainWindow.hide() })` — hides instead of closing
- `app.on('before-quit')` sets a flag to allow real exit from tray menu "Quit"

### Dark Mode
- Tailwind `darkMode: 'class'`; add `class="dark"` to `<html>` unconditionally in `index.html`

### Clock (`useLiveClock` + `LiveClock.tsx`)
- `setInterval` every 1s updating a `Date` state; cleanup in `useEffect` return
- Display: `text-7xl font-mono` to prevent layout shift; dimmed seconds

### Before 5PM Banner (`useBefore5pm` + `Before5pmBanner.tsx`)
- Filter tasks: `due_before_5pm=true AND is_complete=false`
- Countdown = `differenceInSeconds(setHours(today,17,0,0,0), now)`; show "OVERDUE" in red after 5pm
- Style: full-width amber banner with `animate-pulse` border

### Categories Sidebar — "always visible" ADHD fix
- Fixed sidebar, never collapses, always renders all categories
- `categories:get-all` returns task count per category via JOIN
- "All Tasks" is a hardcoded first entry (no DB row)
- Active category stored in Zustand; filters `tasks:get-all` payload

### Brain Dump (`BrainDumpInput.tsx`)
- FAB fixed bottom-right; `Ctrl+Space` global keydown listener toggles it
- On Enter: `tasks:create` with title + active category (or Inbox). Stay open for rapid entry. Escape closes.

### Focus Mode (`FocusMode.tsx`)
- Full-screen `position: fixed inset-0 z-50` overlay; toggled via Zustand `focusMode`
- TaskCard "Focus" button sets `focusTaskId` in store before entering
- `PomodoroTimer` only renders inside FocusMode

### Pomodoro (`usePomodoro.ts`)
- State machine: `idle → work(25m) → short_break(5m)` × 4, then `long_break(30m)`, repeat
- `setInterval` countdown; `sessionIndex` 0–3 tracks position in cycle
- SVG circle arc (`stroke-dashoffset`) for progress; 4 dot indicators
- IPC only at session start/end (for logging); timer logic stays in renderer

### Drag-to-Reorder (`@dnd-kit`)
- `DndContext` + `SortableContext` wrapping `TaskList`; each `TaskCard` uses `useSortable`
- `onDragEnd`: `arrayMove` → optimistic local update → `tasks:reorder` IPC
- Revert on IPC failure

### Recurring Tasks
- On `tasks:complete` for a recurring task: mark complete, INSERT new row with `due_date` advanced by `addDays`/`addWeeks`/`addMonths` (date-fns in main process)

### Gamification
- `GamificationStub.tsx` — empty component with a TODO comment
- `pomodoro_sessions` table already logs data for future use
- Research agent running in background; findings saved to memory for next session

## Build & Package Commands
```bash
npm create @quick-start/electron adhd-todo -- --template react-ts
cd adhd-todo
npm install better-sqlite3 @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities date-fns zustand
npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer electron-rebuild electron-builder
npx tailwindcss init -p
npx shadcn@latest init
npx shadcn@latest add button dialog input label badge tooltip
npx electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3
npm run dev          # hot reload
npm run build && npx electron-builder --win   # produces .exe in release/
```

## Verification
1. `npm run dev` — app launches, tray icon appears, window opens/hides correctly
2. Add a task → appears in list; reload app → task persists (SQLite)
3. Mark a recurring daily task complete → new task appears with tomorrow's date
4. Brain dump: `Ctrl+Space` → type → Enter → task appears instantly
5. Pomodoro: start → 25min countdown → auto-transitions to break → 4th break is 30min
6. Before5pmBanner: add a task with `due_before_5pm=true` → banner appears with countdown
7. Drag a task → order persists after reload

## Gamification (follow-up)
- Background agent `ac5292acbafe192e8` is researching ADHD gamification patterns
- Findings will be saved to memory; implement in a separate session after core app is complete

## Context

- **@dnd-kit** (drag-and-drop)
- **date-fns** (date math in both processes)

## Context
Build a brand-new Electron desktop to-do app for a user with ADHD. The app must be dark-mode only, persist data via SQLite, live in the system tray, and include ADHD-friendly features: large live clock, "DO BEFORE 5PM" countdown, focus mode, Pomodoro timer (4×25/5 + 30min break), brain dump quick-add, subtasks with time estimates, drag-to-reorder, color coding, and recurring tasks. A gamification research agent is running in the background; its findings will be implemented in a follow-up session.

## Tech Stack
- **Electron** + **electron-vite** (scaffolded via `npm create @quick-start/electron`)
- **React 18** + **TypeScript** (renderer)
- **Tailwind CSS** + **shadcn/ui** (dark UI components)
- **better-sqlite3** (SQLite; native addon, requires `electron-rebuild`)
- **@dnd-kit** (drag-and-drop)
- **date-fns** (date math in both processes)
- **Zustand** (ephemeral UI state only — not persisted task data)

## File Structure
```
adhd-todo/
├── electron.vite.config.ts
├── package.json / tsconfig*.json / tailwind.config.ts
├── resources/icon.ico
└── src/
    ├── main/
    │   ├── index.ts          # BrowserWindow, tray, app lifecycle
    │   ├── tray.ts           # SystemTray + context menu
    │   ├── window.ts         # Window helpers
    │   ├── ipc/
    │   │   ├── index.ts      # Registers all handlers
    │   │   ├── tasks.ts      # CRUD + reorder + complete (handles recurrence)
    │   │   ├── categories.ts
    │   │   ├── subtasks.ts
    │   │   └── pomodoro.ts   # Session start/complete logging
    │   └── db/
    │       ├── index.ts      # Open DB + run migrations
    │       ├── migrations.ts # All CREATE TABLE statements
    │       ├── tasks.ts / categories.ts / subtasks.ts / pomodoro.ts
    ├── preload/
    │   └── index.ts          # contextBridge whitelist of ipcRenderer.invoke
    ├── renderer/
    │   ├── main.tsx / App.tsx / globals.css
    │   ├── components/
    │   │   ├── layout/       AppShell, Header, Sidebar
    │   │   ├── clock/        LiveClock
    │   │   ├── banner/       Before5pmBanner
    │   │   ├── tasks/        TaskList, TaskCard, TaskForm, SubtaskList, RecurringBadge
    │   │   ├── categories/   CategoryItem, CategoryForm
    │   │   ├── braindump/    BrainDumpInput (FAB + Ctrl+Space shortcut)
    │   │   ├── focus/        FocusMode, PomodoroTimer
    │   │   └── gamification/ GamificationStub (empty placeholder)
    │   ├── hooks/            useTasks, useCategories, useSubtasks, useLiveClock,
    │   │                     useBefore5pm, usePomodoro, useDragOrder
    │   ├── store/            appStore.ts (Zustand: activeCategory, focusMode,
    │   │                     focusTaskId, brainDumpOpen)
    │   └── lib/              ipc.ts (typed wrappers), utils.ts
    └── shared/
        ├── types.ts          # Task, Category, Subtask, PomodoroSession interfaces
        └── ipc-channels.ts   # Channel name constants
```

## SQLite Schema (src/main/db/migrations.ts)
```sql
PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  color TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '#6366f1',
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (name, color) VALUES ('Inbox', '#6366f1');

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  category_id INTEGER REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  color TEXT,
  due_date TEXT,
  due_before_5pm INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  time_estimate_mins INTEGER,
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  is_complete INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  completed_at TEXT,
  recurring_pattern TEXT,       -- 'none'|'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'
  recurring_base_id INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subtasks (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  is_complete INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pomodoro_sessions (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  task_id INTEGER REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  phase TEXT NOT NULL,          -- 'work'|'short_break'|'long_break'
  duration_s INTEGER NOT NULL,
  started_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  completed_at TEXT,
  was_completed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
);
```

## IPC Channels (src/shared/ipc-channels.ts)
- `tasks:get-all`, `tasks:get-by-id`, `tasks:create`, `tasks:update`, `tasks:delete`, `tasks:reorder`, `tasks:complete`
- `categories:get-all` (returns `CategoryWithCount`), `categories:create`, `categories:update`, `categories:delete`
- `subtasks:get-by-task`, `subtasks:create`, `subtasks:update`, `subtasks:delete`, `subtasks:reorder`
- `pomodoro:start-session`, `pomodoro:complete-session`
- `app:minimize-to-tray`, `app:quit`

## Key Implementation Notes

### Critical build notes
- `better-sqlite3` is a native addon — run `npx electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3` after install
- Mark `better-sqlite3` as `external` in the main-process Vite config
- Packaging: add `"asarUnpack": ["**/*.node"]` to electron-builder config

### System Tray
- `mainWindow.on('close', e => { e.preventDefault(); mainWindow.hide() })` — hides instead of closing
- `app.on('before-quit')` sets a flag to allow real exit from tray menu "Quit"

### Dark Mode
- Tailwind `darkMode: 'class'`; add `class="dark"` to `<html>` unconditionally in `index.html`

### Clock (`useLiveClock` + `LiveClock.tsx`)
- `setInterval` every 1s updating a `Date` state; cleanup in `useEffect` return
- Display: `text-7xl font-mono` to prevent layout shift; dimmed seconds

### Before 5PM Banner (`useBefore5pm` + `Before5pmBanner.tsx`)
- Filter tasks: `due_before_5pm=true AND is_complete=false`
- Countdown = `differenceInSeconds(setHours(today,17,0,0,0), now)`; show "OVERDUE" in red after 5pm
- Style: full-width amber banner with `animate-pulse` border

### Categories Sidebar — "always visible" ADHD fix
- Fixed sidebar, never collapses, always renders all categories
- `categories:get-all` returns task count per category via JOIN
- "All Tasks" is a hardcoded first entry (no DB row)
- Active category stored in Zustand; filters `tasks:get-all` payload

### Brain Dump (`BrainDumpInput.tsx`)
- FAB fixed bottom-right; `Ctrl+Space` global keydown listener toggles it
- On Enter: `tasks:create` with title + active category (or Inbox). Stay open for rapid entry. Escape closes.

### Focus Mode (`FocusMode.tsx`)
- Full-screen `position: fixed inset-0 z-50` overlay; toggled via Zustand `focusMode`
- TaskCard "Focus" button sets `focusTaskId` in store before entering
- `PomodoroTimer` only renders inside FocusMode

### Pomodoro (`usePomodoro.ts`)
- State machine: `idle → work(25m) → short_break(5m)` × 4, then `long_break(30m)`, repeat
- `setInterval` countdown; `sessionIndex` 0–3 tracks position in cycle
- SVG circle arc (`stroke-dashoffset`) for progress; 4 dot indicators
- IPC only at session start/end (for logging); timer logic stays in renderer

### Drag-to-Reorder (`@dnd-kit`)
- `DndContext` + `SortableContext` wrapping `TaskList`; each `TaskCard` uses `useSortable`
- `onDragEnd`: `arrayMove` → optimistic local update → `tasks:reorder` IPC
- Revert on IPC failure

### Recurring Tasks
- On `tasks:complete` for a recurring task: mark complete, INSERT new row with `due_date` advanced by `addDays`/`addWeeks`/`addMonths` (date-fns in main process)

### Gamification
- `GamificationStub.tsx` — empty component with a TODO comment
- `pomodoro_sessions` table already logs data for future use
- Research agent running in background; findings saved to memory for next session

## Build & Package Commands
```bash
npm create @quick-start/electron adhd-todo -- --template react-ts
cd adhd-todo
npm install better-sqlite3 @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities date-fns zustand
npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer electron-rebuild electron-builder
npx tailwindcss init -p
npx shadcn@latest init
npx shadcn@latest add button dialog input label badge tooltip
npx electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3
npm run dev          # hot reload
npm run build && npx electron-builder --win   # produces .exe in release/
```

## Verification
1. `npm run dev` — app launches, tray icon appears, window opens/hides correctly
2. Add a task → appears in list; reload app → task persists (SQLite)
3. Mark a recurring daily task complete → new task appears with tomorrow's date
4. Brain dump: `Ctrl+Space` → type → Enter → task appears instantly
5. Pomodoro: start → 25min countdown → auto-transitions to break → 4th break is 30min
6. Before5pmBanner: add a task with `due_before_5pm=true` → banner appears with countdown
7. Drag a task → order persists after reload

## Gamification (follow-up)
- Background agent `ac5292acbafe192e8` is researching ADHD gamification patterns
- Findings will be saved to memory; implement in a separate session after core app is complete

import { ipcMain } from 'electron'
import { IPC } from '@shared/ipc-channels'
import type { CreateTaskPayload, UpdateTaskPayload } from '@shared/types'
import { getDb } from '../db'
import * as db from '../db/tasks'

export function registerTaskHandlers(): void {
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.GET_ALL, (_e, opts) => db.getAllTasks(getDb(), opts))
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.GET_BY_ID, (_e, { id }) => db.getTaskById(getDb(), id))
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.CREATE, (_e, payload: CreateTaskPayload) =>
    db.createTask(getDb(), payload)
  )
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.UPDATE, (_e, payload: UpdateTaskPayload) =>
    db.updateTask(getDb(), payload)
  )
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.DELETE, (_e, { id }) => db.deleteTask(getDb(), id))
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.REORDER, (_e, { orderedIds }) => db.reorderTasks(getDb(), orderedIds))
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.COMPLETE, (_e, { id }) => db.completeTask(getDb(), id))
}

export function registerTaskHandlers(): void {
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.GET_ALL, (_e, opts) => db.getAllTasks(getDb(), opts))
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.GET_BY_ID, (_e, { id }) => db.getTaskById(getDb(), id))
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.CREATE, (_e, payload: CreateTaskPayload) =>
    db.createTask(getDb(), payload)
  )
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.UPDATE, (_e, payload: UpdateTaskPayload) =>
    db.updateTask(getDb(), payload)
  )
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.DELETE, (_e, { id }) => db.deleteTask(getDb(), id))
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.REORDER, (_e, { orderedIds }) => db.reorderTasks(getDb(), orderedIds))
  ipcMain.handle(IPC.TASKS.COMPLETE, (_e, { id }) => db.completeTask(getDb(), id))
}
